name: Rahul Sharma
review: Wholeup completely transformed our Meta Ads strategy. Sales grew by over 200% last quarter alone — genuinely impressed by their data-driven approach and attention to detail.

name: Ayesha Khan
review: Our YouTube channel was completely stagnant. Their thumbnail strategy and video SEO took our views from 50K to 600K in just 3 months. Absolutely incredible team.

name: Suresh Patel
review: Their SEO team is exceptional. Our top 5 keywords now rank on Google's first page — without any paid ads. Organic traffic is up 340% in 5 months.

name: Priya Rao
review: The UI/UX and web development work is absolutely world-class. Our website now gets compliments from every client we show it to. Conversions are up 3x.

name: Amit Verma
review: Wholeup scaled our YouTube channel from 30K to 116K subscribers in 6 months. Their content strategy is unlike anything we'd seen before.

name: Neha Joshi
review: Top-tier in every way. From strategy to execution, everything is handled with professionalism and measurable outcomes. Highest recommend from our team.

name: Vikram Mehta
review: We tried 3 agencies before Wholeup. Nobody else delivered. Their Google Ads restructure brought our cost-per-lead down by 45% in 6 weeks. Remarkable results.

name: Sneha Kulkarni
review: Our Instagram was dead at 800 followers. Wholeup's reel strategy took us to 42K in 90 days. The content quality and consistency is outstanding.

name: Arjun Nair
review: Professional, transparent and results-oriented. They set clear KPIs from day one and hit every single target. Our monthly leads tripled within 4 months.

name: Pooja Desai
review: Absolutely blown away by the quality of work. Our brand identity, social media, and Google Ads are all handled seamlessly. Best investment we've made.

name: Rohit Kapoor
review: Booked 3 months of advance reservations through their Meta Ads campaign. The ROI was 6.2x. Working with Wholeup is genuinely a game-changer for our hotel.
